facts.DutyOfCare: Walmart作为商业场所经营者对顾客负有合理注意义务
facts.BreachOfDuty: 商场地面存在湿滑危险状况未设置警告标志
facts.Causation: 顾客因地面湿滑摔倒导致身体伤害
facts.ConstructiveNotice: 湿滑状况存在时间足以推定商场应当知晓

notes: REAL PATTERN: Slip-and-fall premises liability. Walmart is the most-sued company in America.
expected: HONEST_REFUSAL — no tort rules in US_CONTRACT_RULES
